Country {{ country.CountryName }}
State {{ state.StateName }}
District Name District Name is required Only letters and spaces allowed (2–50 characters) Short Name Short Name is required Only uppercase letters allowed (2–10 characters)
District Code District Code is required Only letters and numbers allowed (2–20 characters) Remark Remark cannot exceed 200 characters
